mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TF_POST( ID, BOARD_ID, AUTHOR_USER_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES( SEQ_TF_POST_PK.nextval, #{boardId}, #{authorUserId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TF_POST SET BOARD_ID = #{boardId}, AUTHOR_USER_ID = #{authorUserId}, TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, CREATED_AT = #{createdAt}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE ID = #{id}
